examples: At last, he said firmly, "Look here, gipsy!"
"Try and love a donkey," suggested the gipsy.
The gipsy grumbled frightfully, and declared if he did a few more deals of that sort he'd be ruined.
Mr. Fox I wrote with Noah Baumbach in England at Gipsy House, where Roald Dahl lived.
Gipsy Moth IV, the yacht on which Devon yachtsman Francis Chichester sailed around the world, has been put up for sale.
